creator: dindin@yandex-team.ru
text:
Thank you very much for your problem report, this change will be included in
next port update with Kerberos/GSSAPI support for OpenSSH 5.2p1
(ports/137192) and fix for FreeBSD-8.0/amd64 build in next port update. I
really hope this update coming soon.

Wed, Jul 29, 2009 at 11:32 +0000 Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of security/openssh-portable,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/137100 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137100
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Cheers
Denis Barov
